h1: Full Home Renovations Services in Clearwater, FL
intro: Complete home transformation services in Clearwater, FL. Titan Homes Group manages every trade, permit, and detail of your full home renovation — delivering stunning results under one licensed contractor.
bodyContent:
Titan Homes Group specializes in complete whole-home renovations for Clearwater, FL homeowners. If you've purchased a fixer-upper, want to modernize an aging property, or plan to maximize your home's value before selling, our experienced team delivers comprehensive renovation solutions with unmatched coordination and quality.

What sets Titan Homes Group apart for Clearwater full home renovations is our ability to manage every aspect of your project — kitchen, bathrooms, flooring, painting, windows, doors, and exterior work — under one contract with one point of contact. This eliminates the coordination headaches that come with managing multiple contractors.

Our Clearwater renovation process begins with a thorough assessment and a detailed scope-of-work proposal with transparent line-item pricing. We create 3D design concepts before construction begins, keep you informed with regular progress updates, and ensure every detail meets your vision.

With 10+ years serving the Tampa Bay area and 350+ completed projects, Titan Homes Group is the trusted choice for homeowners in Clearwater who want a reliable, experienced partner for their biggest investment.

faqs.question: How do you price full home renovations in Clearwater?
faqs.answer: We provide detailed, line-item pricing after a thorough in-home assessment of your Clearwater property. Pricing depends on home size, scope of work, and your material selections. We're committed to complete transparency — no surprise charges.

faqs.question: Do I need to move out during a full home renovation in Clearwater?
faqs.answer: For extensive gut renovations in Clearwater, we typically recommend temporarily relocating. For phased projects, many clients remain at home. We'll advise on the best approach for your specific project and timeline.

faqs.question: How long does a full home renovation take in Clearwater?
faqs.answer: Whole-home renovation timelines vary based on scope. Most projects in Clearwater range from 2–6 months. We provide a detailed project schedule before work begins so you always know what to expect.
